subject: Margin Analysis - Product Line Profitability
body:
Product and Finance Teams,

Detailed margin analysis by product line for Q1 2026:

Core Platform:
- Revenue: $8.4M
- COGS: $1.5M (hosting: $980K, support: $520K)
- Gross Margin: 82.1%
- Trend: Improving (was 79.3% in Q1 2025)

AI Assistant Add-on:
- Revenue: $2.1M
- COGS: $1.1M (LLM API costs: $890K, compute: $210K)
- Gross Margin: 47.6%
- Trend: Improving (was 32% at launch)

Professional Services:
- Revenue: $1.6M
- COGS: $1.2M (consultant salaries + contractors)
- Gross Margin: 25%
- Trend: Stable

API/Integration Platform:
- Revenue: $700K
- COGS: $120K
- Gross Margin: 82.9%

Blended Gross Margin: 69.2%

Key Insight: AI Assistant margins are improving rapidly as we optimize prompt engineering and caching. At current trajectory, expect 60%+ gross margin by Q4. The product mix shift toward AI is temporarily diluting blended margins but will normalize.

Action: Need to review professional services pricing - 25% margin is below our 35% target.
